title: geum selinifolium
intro: Geum selinifolium, also known as Woodland Avens, is a perennial plant that belongs to the rose family and is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and acting as a natural antiseptic. Geum selinifolium can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herb in herbal medicine.
